name: Market Monitor
description: Watches token prices through Norien's data API and reports movements above a threshold.

environment.name: WATCH_INTERVAL_SECONDS
environment.description: How often to poll the market API.

environment.name: MOVE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT
environment.description: Report a token when its 24h change exceeds this, in percent.

environment.name: WATCH_LIMIT
environment.description: How many tokens to watch, ranked by 24h volume.
